Resources

Request Prospectus

If you would rather read at your own pace, the prospectus brings together the whole picture, from philosophy to practicalities, in a single document.

Download the ICI Prospectus

Enter your email to receive an instant link to download our comprehensive guide to coaching credentials.

The International Coaching Institute trains and certifies coaches one-to-one, online, blending coaching craft with leadership, psychology, neuroscience and human behaviour. Become the coach people trust.
